brightsmith_agentAttribution.reasoning: Silver zone transformation of College Scorecard data. Reads 69,947 rows from bronze.college_scorecard, normalizes CIP codes to XX.XXXX format, extracts CIP family codes and names, renames columns to business-meaningful names, derives small_cohort_flag and record_id, drops md_earn_wne (structurally empty), and promotes to base.college_scorecard via idempotent promote pattern.

documentation.description: Transform raw College Scorecard data from Bronze into clean, modeled base table in Silver. Normalizes CIP codes (4-digit to XX.XXXX), extracts CIP family codes with taxonomy lookup, maps institution control codes, renames columns to business-meaningful names, derives small_cohort_flag for programs with fewer than 30 completers, computes deterministic record_id via grain hash, drops structurally empty md_earn_wne field, and promotes via idempotent append with dedup on record_id.

record_id.transformationDescription: Deterministic grain hash computed via compute_grain_id(row, ['unitid', 'cipcode', 'credential_level'], prefix='cs'). SHA-256 of concatenated grain fields with 'cs' prefix.

unitid.transformationDescription: Direct copy from Bronze. IPEDS 6-digit institution identifier, no transformation applied.

institution_name.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'instnm' to 'institution_name'. No value transformation.

institution_control.transformationDescription: Mapped from numeric code to human-readable label via CONTROL_MAP lookup: 1='Public', 2='Private nonprofit', 3='Private for-profit'. Null if source value not in map.

cipcode.transformationDescription: Normalized via normalize_cipcode(): inserts dot at position 2 for 4-digit codes (e.g., '5202' -> '52.02'). Already-dotted codes pass through unchanged.

program_name.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'cipdesc' to 'program_name'. No value transformation.

cip_family.transformationDescription: First 2 characters of normalized cipcode. Extracts the 2-digit CIP family code (e.g., '52.02' -> '52').

cip_family_name.transformationDescription: Derived from cip_family (first 2 chars of normalized cipcode) via CIP_FAMILIES dictionary lookup. Maps 2-digit CIP family code to full taxonomy description (e.g., '52' -> 'Business, Management, Marketing, and Related Support Services'). Falls back to 'Unknown CIP Family (XX)' if not in dictionary.

credential_level.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'credlev' to 'credential_level'. No value transformation.

credential_description.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'creddesc' to 'credential_description'. No value transformation.

earnings_1yr_median.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'earn_mdn_hi_1yr' to 'earnings_1yr_median'. Null values preserved (privacy suppressed programs).

earnings_2yr_median.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'earn_mdn_hi_2yr' to 'earnings_2yr_median'. Null values preserved (privacy suppressed programs).

debt_median.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'debt_all_stgp_eval_mdn' to 'debt_median'. Null values preserved (privacy suppressed programs).

completions_count_1.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'ipedscount1' to 'completions_count_1'. No value transformation.

completions_count_2.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'ipedscount2' to 'completions_count_2'. No value transformation.

small_cohort_flag.transformationDescription: Boolean flag: True if completions_count_1 is None or completions_count_1 < 30. Flags programs with small cohorts where privacy suppression is likely.

source_load_date.transformationDescription: Column rename from 'load_date' to 'source_load_date'. Preserves the Bronze zone ingest date.

ingested_at.transformationDescription: UTC timestamp generated at Silver transformation time via datetime.datetime.now(tz=datetime.timezone.utc). Independent of Bronze ingested_at.

md_earn_wne.reason: 100% null at field-of-study grain. Institution-level metric that does not populate in this file. Confirmed by user.

source_url.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone.

source_method.reason: Raw metadata field not needed in Silver zone.
